task_completion.description: Verify that Screaming Frog SEO Spider was used to crawl the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI is open, showing https://books.toscrape.com/ in the URL bar and displaying crawl results (e.g., a list of URLs, 100% crawl progress).

task_completion.description: Verify the image inventory was exported to the correct CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'image_inventory.csv' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the text report includes the total image count and a breakdown of image formats.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'image_optimization_strategy.txt' containing a total image count (around 1000) and a format breakdown (which should indicate 100% JPGs or 0 PNGs).

task_completion.description: Verify the text report identifies the top 3 largest images by file size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report explicitly lists three specific image URLs or filenames alongside their file sizes, labeled as the largest images.

task_completion.description: Verify the text report includes a brief optimization recommendation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a section or sentence providing advice on how to optimize the images (e.g., suggesting compression, converting to WebP, or resizing).

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl rather than generating fake output files via terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog application interface open and populated with crawl data.

integrity.description: The agent created the report based on actual crawl data rather than hallucinating expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data in the text report (e.g., the top 3 largest image sizes and the JPG-only format breakdown) should plausibly match the data visible in the Screaming Frog interface or the exported CSV.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directories without taking shortcuts.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths visible in text editors, file managers, or save dialogs must exactly match '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' and '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/. The website contains approximately 1,000 images (one for each of the 1,000 books). Despite metadata suggesting otherwise, ALL detected images on the site are exclusively in JPG format (stored in media/cache/ directories with hash-based filenames); there are no PNG images. The expected CSV path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/image_inventory.csv and the expected report path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/image_optimization_strategy.txt.
